generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we relied on others for our security? Look how far we've come! Our strategic autonomy ensures we're never at the mercy of foreign powers again. Some say it's too much, but ask yourself: would you rather depend on others or stand strong on our own? #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
